LanguageData.Ammo_40x46mmGrenade_HE.label: 40x46mm grenade (HE)
LanguageData.Ammo_40x46mmGrenade_HE.description: Low velocity grenade fired from handheld grenade launchers.

LanguageData.Ammo_40x46mmGrenade_HEDP.description: Low velocity grenade fired from handheld grenade launchers.

LanguageData.Ammo_40x46mmGrenade_EMP.description: Low velocity grenade fired from handheld grenade launchers.
LanguageData.Ammo_40x46mmGrenade_Smoke.label: 40x46mm grenade (Smoke)
LanguageData.Ammo_40x46mmGrenade_Smoke.description: Low velocity grenade fired from handheld grenade launchers.

LanguageData.Ammo_40x46mmGrenade_Tox.description: Low velocity grenade fired from handheld grenade launchers.
